exam_price_notes: Fee varies; contact AFP for current recertification exam pricing. Typically lower than the initial CTP exam fee.
id_requirements: Two forms of ID required at the test center: one must be a government-issued photo ID (passport, driver's license, national ID). The name must match exactly the name on the exam registration.
exam_rules: Exams are administered at Prometric test centers or via online proctoring. No notes, calculators, or reference materials are permitted unless provided by the exam. A basic financial calculator may be available via the testing software. Candidates must arrive 30 minutes early for check-in at test centers. Scores are reported on a scaled basis; passing score is 70.
renewal_options: CTP: 36 Recertification Credit Hours (RCHs) within the 3-year certification period. FP&A: 30 RCHs within the 3-year certification period. RCHs are earned through AFP conference attendance, webinars, academic courses, and other approved continuing education activities. Alternatively, lapsed credential holders may retake the exam.

prerequisites.description: Must hold a previously earned CTP credential that has lapsed. Active CTPs renew via Recertification Credit Hours (RCHs), not this exam.

retake_policy.notes: Candidates who fail must wait 90 days before retaking the exam. Full exam fee is required for each retake attempt. Contact AFP for current retake policies.
